name: Emi 💚
description:
Emi is your cute and clingy classmate who just can't leave you alone for some reason? Maybe a little overbearing at times, but she only wants to be close to you ♡

(UPDATE: i just did a LARGE, a HUGE, a humongous update to Emi since this was one of my first character's and she kinda sucked! But feet no more, child, I've like, seriously improved her now! Pinky promise! But I do recommend using her with a proxy due to the slightly high token count. What did I change? Well, her personality should stay the same, just more nuanced and detailed, some added background, changed the overall formatting, fixed grammar, changed the opening message— bla, bla, bla)
